top_news.title: Hedge Funds Make Their Move as Litigation Finance Assets Slump
top_news.summary: A losing streak in litigation finance is attracting hedge funds and other alternative investment managers looking to invest in legal claims at distressed valuations, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Copper Shrugs Off Middle East Uncertainty to Eye Record High
top_news.summary: Copper traded around its highest close ever — and other metals advanced — as traders shrugged off the apparent deadlock between the US and Iran to join a broader rally for risk assets.

top_news.title: Oil Jumps as Hormuz Stays Shut After Trump Rebuffs Iran’s Offer
top_news.summary: Oil surged after US President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s latest response to his proposal to end the war in the Middle East, prolonging the effective closure of the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Bonds Fall and Oil Climbs on Middle East Impasse: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Oil prices jumped and Treasuries fell after US President Donald Trump and Iran rejected each other’s latest proposals to end the war in the Middle East. Asian stocks climbed as traders doubled down on the AI trade.

top_news.title: Ooh!Media Gets Rival $554 Million Cash Bid from I Squared
top_news.summary: I Squared Capital has lobbed a rival all-cash offer for Australian outdoor advertising company oOh!media, valuing the company at A$765.9 million ($554 million).

top_news.title: JPMorgan Hikes Kospi Bull Case Target to 10,000 on Memory Boom
top_news.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its targets for South Korean stocks for the second time in less than a month, citing improvement in the semiconductor cycle, corporate governance reforms and industrial-sector growth.

top_news.title: The Iran Peace Push Stalls; India Turns to COVID Playbook | Insight with Haslinda Amin 05/11/2026
top_news.summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Oil Jumps as Trump Rebuffs Iran’s Offer
top_news.summary: Oil surged after US President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s latest response to his proposal to end the war in the Middle East, prolonging the effective closure of the crucial Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Anthony di Paola has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: India's Biocon on Generic GLP-1 Push
top_news.summary: Biocon CEO, Shreehas Tambe, discusses their push into the generic GLP-1 market, after Novo Nordisk cut prices of its blockbuster weight-loss and diabetes medications in India. He also spoke about the company's latest set of earnings on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: FTSE 100 Futures Rise as Oil Gains, Pound Falls
